title: Sending Offers to Landlords for Approval

content.intro: The landlord approval workflow in Offers V2 allows you to forward a tenant's offer to the landlord for sign-off before proceeding to referencing. This is optional but recommended for managed properties.

sections.title: How to Send an Offer to a Landlord

steps.title: Find a Pending Offer
steps.content: In Offers V2, locate an offer with Pending status. These are offers submitted by tenants that are awaiting your action.

steps.title: Open the Offer
steps.content: Click the offer row to open the full offer detail view.

steps.title: Click Send to Landlord
steps.content: Click the 'Send to Landlord' button. This sends the landlord an email containing the tenant's details and the offered rent.

steps.title: Landlord Reviews the Offer
steps.content: The landlord receives an email with the applicant's name, offered rent, and property address. They can indicate approval by replying or via the link in the email.

steps.title: Receive Approval Notification
steps.content: When the landlord approves the offer, you are notified by email. Alternatively, you can approve the offer yourself directly in Offers V2.

steps.title: Proceed to Referencing
steps.content: Once approved, click 'Start Reference' on the offer to move the applicant into the References V2 workflow.

sections.title: Landlord Approval Emails
sections.content: Landlord approval emails are sent from your company's notification email address. You can update this in Settings → Company under the notification email field.
